node.title: Classify persisted domains into shared runtime, worktree-local cache, and process-local hot state

acceptance.label: Every persisted domain has an explicit owner and authority class, including graph, history, projections, workspace tree, coordination, episodic memory, outcomes, curator state, and principal registry.
The redesign records which domains must remain shared across worktrees and which must become worktree-local.

plan.title: storage-boundary-redesign: separate true shared runtime state from worktree-local semantic cache state, introduce explicit shared-vs-local store ownership and paths, migrate existing repos safely, and validate that cross-worktree shared semantics remain correct while local semantic cache state no longer bloats the shared runtime db.

node.title: Introduce distinct path and bootstrap defaults for worktree cache db vs shared runtime db

acceptance.label: Workspace cache paths no longer resolve to the shared runtime db by default.
Session/bootstrap wiring can open a worktree-local cache store and a separate shared runtime store without aliasing them accidentally.

plan.title: storage-boundary-redesign: separate true shared runtime state from worktree-local semantic cache state, introduce explicit shared-vs-local store ownership and paths, migrate existing repos safely, and validate that cross-worktree shared semantics remain correct while local semantic cache state no longer bloats the shared runtime db.

node.title: Split store interfaces so shared runtime and local semantic cache expose different capabilities

acceptance.label: Shared runtime code no longer wraps the full local semantic cache store surface as if it were one broad sqlite authority.
Local semantic cache and shared runtime code paths depend on narrower role-specific traits or types with explicit ownership boundaries.

plan.title: storage-boundary-redesign: separate true shared runtime state from worktree-local semantic cache state, introduce explicit shared-vs-local store ownership and paths, migrate existing repos safely, and validate that cross-worktree shared semantics remain correct while local semantic cache state no longer bloats the shared runtime db.

node.title: Decide ownership, retention, and compaction rules for outcomes and curator state under the split

acceptance.label: The redesign explicitly decides whether outcomes and curator state are shared, worktree-local, or split across both planes.
The redesign defines retention or compaction rules that prevent unbounded shared-runtime growth for the chosen ownership model.

plan.title: storage-boundary-redesign: separate true shared runtime state from worktree-local semantic cache state, introduce explicit shared-vs-local store ownership and paths, migrate existing repos safely, and validate that cross-worktree shared semantics remain correct while local semantic cache state no longer bloats the shared runtime db.

node.title: Migrate existing repos by moving worktree-local semantic tables out of the shared runtime db

acceptance.label: Existing repos can migrate without losing authoritative shared coordination or memory state.
The migration relocates worktree-local semantic cache tables and rehydrates bootstrap state from the new split correctly.
